title: Feature: Batch Command Execution with Context Indexing

steps.description: Define IBatchExecutionPort trait, BatchSession, SearchResult, and CommandSessionError types in hex-agent/src/ports/command_session.rs. Extend mod.rs to export. No implementation — port only.
steps.done_condition: cargo check -p hex-agent passes with IBatchExecutionPort, BatchSession, SearchResult, CommandSessionError all exported from ports module

steps.description: Implement CommandSessionAdapter in hex-agent/src/adapters/secondary/command_session.rs. Uses tokio::process::Command to execute commands, stores output in HashMap<String, Vec<IndexedLine>> keyed by session UUID. Implements substring search with scoring. TTL eviction via background tokio task (sweep every 60s). Enforces HEX_CMD_SESSION_MAX_MB cap. Merges stdout+stderr in emission order.
steps.done_condition: cargo test -p hex-agent command_session passes: happy-path execute+search, failed-command output indexed, TTL expiry returns SessionExpired, capacity exceeded returns CapacityExceeded, timeout kills process

steps.description: Add hex_batch_execute and hex_batch_search MCP tools in hex-cli/src/commands/mcp.rs (or the MCP tool registry). hex_batch_execute: accepts commands[] + working_dir, returns BatchSession JSON. hex_batch_search: accepts session_id + queries[] + optional context_lines, returns Vec<SearchResult> JSON sorted by score, max 50 results.
steps.done_condition: hex mcp list includes hex_batch_execute and hex_batch_search with correct schemas; cargo check -p hex-cli passes

steps.description: Add nexus proxy route in hex-nexus/src/routes/command_sessions.rs. POST /api/command-sessions proxies to hex-agent IBatchExecutionPort. GET /api/command-sessions/{session_id}/search?q=... proxies search. Register routes in hex-nexus/src/routes/mod.rs. This route is informational (dashboard visibility) — it does not store output centrally.
steps.done_condition: cargo check -p hex-nexus passes; POST /api/command-sessions returns 200 with session JSON in manual test

steps.description: Wire CommandSessionAdapter into hex-agent composition root. Add to Deps struct, inject into MCP server tool handlers and any task_executor paths that currently return raw command output. Ensure existing ContextManagerAdapter is unaffected.
steps.done_condition: cargo build -p hex-agent succeeds; hex mcp tool call hex_batch_execute returns session_id (not raw output)

steps.description: Integration tests: (a) unit test CommandSessionAdapter with real subprocesses (no mocks per ADR-014 — use dependency injection via Deps), (b) MCP tool e2e test via hex_agent MCP server: call hex_batch_execute then hex_batch_search and assert raw output absent from first response, (c) TTL eviction test with shortened TTL env var.
steps.done_condition: cargo test -p hex-agent -- --test-threads=1 passes all command_session tests; MCP e2e test confirms raw output absent from batch_execute response

cargo.name: tokio
cargo.purpose: Async subprocess execution + TTL timer (already in workspace)

mergeOrder: step-1 first (port interface — all adapters depend on it)
step-2, step-3, step-4 parallel (tier 2 — independent adapters off the same port)
step-5 after step-2 + step-3 + step-4 (composition root wires all)
step-6 last (integration tests require full stack)

riskRegister.risk: Memory pressure: large builds (LLVM, full workspace) can produce hundreds of MB of output
riskRegister.mitigation: Enforce HEX_CMD_SESSION_MAX_MB cap; add per-session line-count limit (default 50k lines); log a warning when a session approaches 80% of cap

riskRegister.risk: TTL sweep race: session evicted between batch_execute and search in slow agents
riskRegister.mitigation: Return SessionExpired error with clear message; agents should call search immediately after execute

riskRegister.risk: nexus proxy route assumes agent is local — breaks in remote-agent topology
riskRegister.mitigation: Route is informational only; mark as local-only in OpenAPI spec; remote topology is out of scope for this ADR

riskRegister.risk: Subprocess timeout does not clean up child process tree (orphan processes)
riskRegister.mitigation: Use tokio's process group kill on timeout; document known limitation for commands that spawn detached children

successCriteria: hex_batch_execute MCP tool call returns session_id + stats with zero raw output lines in the response
hex_batch_search against a cargo build session returns only error lines, not the full build trace
cargo test -p hex-agent passes all command_session unit + integration tests
ContextManagerAdapter behaviour is unchanged (existing context packing tests still pass)
hex-agent binary size does not increase by more than 500KB (no heavy new deps)
